{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/211-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents_
2. _What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent_
3. _Empirical Case Study: «Обучай»_
4. _Architecture of Professional Colleague Agents_
5. _The Economics of Profession-Wide Replication_
6. _Risks Specific to this Category_
7. _Application Domains_
8. _Pilot Proposal: SGB Advocate Colleague_
9. _Relationship to Other Agent Types_
10. _Open Questions_
11. _Call for Collaboration_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.26)
* [169-table-of-contents|169-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.23)
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] (сходство 0.18)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md]
* [169-table-of-contents|169-table-of-contents.md]

* [308-table-of-contents|308-table-of-contents.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [2. What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent|213-2-what-makes-a-professional-colleague-agent.md] _42%_
* [1. The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents|212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents.md] _37%_
* [9. Relationship to Other Agent Types|220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types.md] _37%_
* [Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md] _33%_
* [Table of Contents|253-table-of-contents.md] _33%_
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md] _29%_
* [3. What Makes a Representative Agent|172-3-what-makes-a-representative-agent.md] _29%_
* [3. Empirical Case Study: «Обучай»|214-3-empirical-case-study-обучай.md] _29%_
